case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARCOS JOSEPH CABRALES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MARCS JOSEPH CABRALES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABRALES, MARCOS JOSEPH $1,261.08 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,361.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CABRALES, MARCOS JOSEPH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,611.08 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CABRALES, MARCOS JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED APR-15-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CABRALES, MARCOS JOSEPH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
